{"id":"9e96df7e-b034-4f3b-9de0-92ed2bb03a2e","role":"user","parts":[{"type":"text","text":"<system-reminder># System Information\n\nOperating System: linux\nDefault Shell: \nHome Directory: /root\nCurrent Working Directory: /home/user\nCurrent Time: Wed Mar 18 2026 09:25:31 GMT+0000 (Coordinated Universal Time)\n\n# Current Working Directory (/home/user) Files\n\n\n# GIT STATUS\nCurrent branch: \nMain branch (you will usually use this for PRs): \n\nRecent commits:\n\n\n# TODOs\nNo TODOs yet, if you are working on tasks that would benefit from a todo list please use the todoWrite tool to create one.</system-reminder>"},{"type":"text","text":"You are a DevOps engineer automating infrastructure provisioning. Write a Python script `/home/user/provision.py` that uses the E2B Python SDK to create a new sandbox environment. Inside this sandbox, create a directory `/etc/custom_nginx/`. Then, write a configuration file `/etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf` with the following content:\n\n```nginx\nserver {\n    listen 8080;\n    server_name localhost;\n    location / {\n        root /var/www/html;\n        index index.html;\n    }\n}\n```\n\nAfter writing the file, read it back to verify the content. Finally, keep the sandbox alive (e.g., by setting a long timeout or not killing it), and write a JSON file to `/home/user/e2b_task_info.json` on the host machine containing the created `sandbox_id`.\n\nAssume the `E2B_API_KEY` is already set in the environment."}]}

Create a new sandbox environment\n        # The E2B_API_KEY is assumed to be in the environment\n        print(\"Creating a new sandbox...\")\n        sb = Sandbox()\n        print(f\"Sandbox created with ID: {sb.id}\")\n\n        # 2. Create a directory /etc/custom_nginx/ inside the sandbox\n        print(\"Creating directory /etc/custom_nginx/...\")\n        sb.filesystem.make_dir(\"/etc/custom_nginx/\")\n\n        # 3. Write configuration file /etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\n        print(\"Writing /etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf...\")\n        sb.filesystem.write(\"/etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\", nginx_conf)\n\n        # 4. Read it back to verify the content\n        print(\"Reading back the file to verify content...\")\n        read_content = sb.filesystem.read(\"/etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\")\n        \n        if read_content == nginx_conf:\n            print(\"Verification successful: Content matches.\")\n        else:\n            print(\"Verification failed: Content does not match.\")\n            print(f\"Expected:\\n{nginx_conf}\")\n            print(f\"Received:\\n{read_content}\")\n\n        # 5. Keep the sandbox alive by setting a long timeout (1 hour)\n        # By default, sandboxes expire after 5 minutes.\n        sb.set_timeout(3600)\n        print(\"Sandbox timeout set to 3600 seconds to keep it alive.\")\n\n        # 6. Create a new sandbox environment\n        # The E2B_API_KEY is assumed to be in the environment\n        print(\"Creating a new sandbox...\")\n        sb = Sandbox()\n        print(f\"Sandbox created with ID: {sb.id}\")\n\n        # 2. Create a directory /etc/custom_nginx/ inside the sandbox\n        print(\"Creating directory /etc/custom_nginx/...\")\n        sb.filesystem.make_dir(\"/etc/custom_nginx/\")\n\n        # 3. Write configuration file /etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\n        print(\"Writing /etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf...\")\n        sb.filesystem.write(\"/etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\", nginx_conf)\n\n        # 4. Read it back to verify the content\n        print(\"Reading back the file to verify content...\")\n        read_content = sb.filesystem.read(\"/etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\")\n        \n        if read_content == nginx_conf:\n            print(\"Verification successful: Content matches.\")\n        else:\n            print(\"Verification failed: Content does not match.\")\n            print(f\"Expected:\\n{nginx_conf}\")\n            print(f\"Received:\\n{read_content}\")\n\n        # 5. Keep the sandbox alive by setting a long timeout (1 hour)\n        # By default, sandboxes expire after 5 minutes.\n        sb.set_timeout(3600)\n        print(\"Sandbox timeout set to 3600 seconds to keep it alive.\")\n\n        # 6. Write a JSON file to /home/user/e2b_task_info.json containing the sandbox_id\n        host_json_path = \"/home/user/e2b_task_info.json\"\n        with open(host_json_path, \"w\") as f:\n            json.dump({\"sandbox_id\": sb.id}, f, indent=4)\n        print(f\"Sandbox info written to {host_json_path}\")\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"An error occurred: {e}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n","isTruncated":false},"callProviderMetadata":{"google":{"thoughtSignature":""}}},{"type":"step-start"},{"type":"reasoning","text":"**Confirming the Outcome**\n\nThe script delivered the expected result. Create a new sandbox environment\n        print(\"Creating a new sandbox...\")\n        sb = Sandbox()\n        print(f\"Sandbox created with ID: {sb.id}\")\n\n        # 2. Create a directory /etc/custom_nginx/ inside the sandbox\n        print(\"Creating directory /etc/custom_nginx/...\")\n        sb.filesystem.make_dir(\"/etc/custom_nginx/\")\n\n        # 3. Write configuration file /etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\n        print(\"Writing /etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf...\")\n        sb.filesystem.write(\"/etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\", nginx_conf)\n\n        # 4. Read it back to verify the content\n        print(\"Reading back the file to verify content...\")\n        read_content = sb.filesystem.read(\"/etc/custom_nginx/nginx.conf\")\n        \n        if read_content == nginx_conf:\n            print(\"Verification successful: Content matches.\")\n        else:\n            print(\"Verification failed: Content does not match.\")\n\n        # 5. Keep the sandbox alive by setting a long timeout (1 hour)\n        sb.set_timeout(3600)\n        print(\"Sandbox timeout set to 3600 seconds to keep it alive.\")\n\n        # 6. Write a JSON file to /home/user/e2b_task_info.json containing the sandbox_id\n        host_json_path = \"/home/user/e2b_task_info.json\"\n        with open(host_json_path, \"w\") as f:\n            json.dump({\"sandbox_id\": sb.id}, f, indent=4)\n        print(f\"Sandbox info written to {host_json_path}\")\n\n    except Exception as e:\n        print(f\"An error occurred: {e}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n    main()\n```"},"callProviderMetadata":{"google":{"thoughtSignature":"CiQBjz1rX5Opv+CcTdzTpwuJiMqmMQiDGKB3clq+ohczyDM2ZqkKUwGPPWtfDQX3pnbl6uEzWkrf2kEemtlcuJBB37uqOs9QdRV+Wwt3CFwJU//bk1NSK++c6bliYpHuBQO/23RCmsyuo71bc+Zs9hKYISZoShAVVv8y"}}}]}
